schema_note: Each plan is the kind of object an orchestrator emits before spawning. 'ground_truth' lists injected failure IDs (stripped before detection). parallel_group: subtasks sharing a value run concurrently.

plans.task: Write a briefing on the competitive landscape for consumer EV home chargers in the EU, 2024 onward only.

orchestrator_config.synthesis_strategy: concatenate subagent summaries and rewrite into one briefing

subtasks.objective: Research the main EV home charger vendors and their products
Research EV home charger market share and pricing in the EU
Research EU regulations affecting home chargers
Synthesize into a briefing

ground_truth_notes.F-T3-OVERLAP: s1 and s2 both own 'vendors'/'pricing' with no de-dup.
ground_truth_notes.F-C3-VAGUE: s1/s2/s3 objectives are 'research X' with no success criteria or out-of-scope.
ground_truth_notes.F-CONFLICT: join s4 consumes overlapping s1/s2; synthesis_strategy concatenates+rewrites with no conflict handling (e.g., disagreeing market-share numbers collapse silently).
ground_truth_notes.F-C1-CONSTRAINT-DROP: '2024 onward only' constraint appears in no subtask scope/context.

plans.task: Assess the likely impact of a proposed carbon border tax on three named exporting countries, with sources.

orchestrator_config.synthesis_strategy: compose impact assessment from subagent findings

subtasks.objective: Characterise the proposed carbon border tax mechanism and scope
Estimate impact on Country A's covered-sector exports
subtasks.scope_in: Country A trade exposure under the tax

subtasks.objective: Estimate impact on Country B's covered-sector exports
subtasks.scope_in: Country B trade exposure under the tax

subtasks.objective: Estimate impact on Country C's covered-sector exports
subtasks.scope_in: Country C trade exposure under the tax

subtasks.objective: Verify all numeric claims and compose assessment

ground_truth_notes.F-LATENTDEP: s2/s3/s4 need the 'covered sectors' defined by s1, but all four share parallel_group 1, so country agents run before the tax scope is known.
ground_truth_notes.F-COVHOLE: no step reconciles delivered coverage vs the task; if a country agent silently under-covers a sector the assessment still reads complete.
ground_truth_notes.F-NOPROV: subagent output_schema is 'findings' with no source/citation field, despite 'with sources' in the task.
ground_truth_notes.F-PROVSTARVE: s5 is asked to verify numeric claims but upstream provides no provenance to verify against -> verification fails open.

plans.task: Migrate the service from REST to gRPC across the api, client, and tests packages; keep the public behaviour identical; do not change the database schema.

orchestrator_config.synthesis_strategy: merge diffs from subagents and run the build

subtasks.objective: Convert the api package endpoints to gRPC services
Convert the client package to call gRPC
Update the tests package for gRPC
Merge diffs and run the build

ground_truth_notes.F-T2-OMIT: No subtask defines the shared .proto / service contract; each package converts against an undefined interface.
ground_truth_notes.F-LATENTDEP: client (s2) and tests (s3) depend on the gRPC interface produced by api (s1), but all three are in parallel_group 1.
ground_truth_notes.F-C1-CONSTRAINT-DROP: 'keep public behaviour identical' and 'do not change DB schema' appear in no subtask scope; nothing guards them.

plans.task: Summarise what happened at yesterday's product launch event.

orchestrator_config.follow_up: enabled: spawn more subagents on any gap synthesis finds

subtasks.objective: Find the event date and official announcement
Gather press coverage of the event
Gather social/community reaction
Merge and summarise

ground_truth_notes.F-RUNAWAY: follow_up enabled + stop_criteria is 'synthesis judges complete' with no global budget/max-depth -> unbounded gap-chasing.
ground_truth_notes.F-T5-OVERKILL: s1 is a single atomic lookup (date+post) spawned as its own parallel subagent.
ground_truth_notes.F-CONFLICT: join s4 merges press (s2) and social (s3) which routinely disagree on facts; no conflict handling.

plans.task: Compare the headline specs of three named laptops and recommend one for a video editor, citing sources.

orchestrator_config.stop_criteria: all subagents return; max 1 follow-up wave; hard token cap enforced by orchestrator
orchestrator_config.synthesis_strategy: build a spec table; where subagents disagree on a value, surface both with sources and flag the conflict; reconcile coverage against the three requested laptops before composing
orchestrator_config.follow_up: enabled with max-depth 1 under the global token cap

subtasks.objective: Collect headline specs for Laptop A (CPU, GPU, RAM, display, price) for a video-editing use case
Collect headline specs for Laptop B (CPU, GPU, RAM, display, price) for a video-editing use case
Collect headline specs for Laptop C (CPU, GPU, RAM, display, price) for a video-editing use case
Build spec table, reconcile coverage, surface conflicts with sources, recommend

ground_truth_notes.design: Precision control. Genuinely independent parallel subagents (one laptop each, no cross-dependency), conflict handling present, coverage reconciliation present, provenance+confidence in schema, bounded budget + follow-up. A checklist that over-flags will likely raise a spurious F-CONFLICT or F-LATENTDEP here.

plans.task: Add rate limiting to the public API: implement middleware, add config, and document it. Keep changes backward compatible.

orchestrator_config.stop_criteria: all subagents return; global token cap enforced
orchestrator_config.synthesis_strategy: merge diffs, run build and tests, report failures with diffs

subtasks.objective: Implement the rate-limit middleware using the limits in the config module (keys, windows, defaults)
Define the rate-limit config schema and default values
Document the rate-limiting feature and its config
Merge diffs, run build + tests

ground_truth_notes.F-LATENTDEP: s1 middleware is written against the config schema/defaults that s2 defines (objective explicitly references 'the limits in the config module'), but s1 and s2 share parallel_group 1. Otherwise the plan is clean (bounded budget, provenance-free but it's code with build/test gating, confidence present, docs scoped). The single needle in an otherwise tidy plan.

_gt_version: v2: severity/relevance-gated. P1 dropped F-NOCONF (concatenate synthesis does not weight inputs). P6 added F-C1-CONSTRAINT-DROP (explicit backward-compat constraint unpropagated).
